productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Casual Grey Wallet
description: Urban girls can't get enough of bold accents and this is the key to a memorable look. Update your wardrobe with this stylish wallet from United Colours Of Benetton. Dimensions : 13.5 cm X 3.5 cm Made of 70% polyester and 30% polyurethane for durability Has one main zippered compartment and one front compartment Four credit card slots and one mesh id card slot on the right side Four slip pockets on either side for essentials Leather flap with metallic clasp and button closure; Brand name on clasp One back compartment with leather mouth and button closure Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
